description_long: This bungalow features a modern, single-story design with a flat roof and clean, white exterior walls. The front facade is adorned with a landscaped garden, arched entryway, and several large windows, while the rear opens to a spacious patio with a uniquely shaped swimming pool and lounge area. The property is bordered by wooden decking and includes two prominent flowering trees, adding vibrant color to the surroundings. A covered carport and shaded outdoor seating area are visible on one side, providing functional outdoor spaces. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with a mix of large and small panes distributed across the facades. The overall layout emphasizes open, airy living with direct access to outdoor amenities.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, landscaped garden, arched entry, and a backyard pool surrounded by wooden decking and flowering trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with an arched doorway, landscaped garden, and large windows.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the swimming pool, patio, and two flowering trees flanking the backyard.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the pool area, wooden deck, and a mix of large and small windows along the facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the carport, shaded outdoor seating, and additional garden space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows
